files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Added get_image_mimetype() method after image_to_base64 validator; image_to_base64 now calls self.get_image_mimetype() instead of inline filetype.guess logic before base64-encoding self.image. Feel free to merge your normalize_image_bytes call in around that same validator body.

fields.summary: Added get_image_mimetype() method after image_to_base64 validator; image_to_base64 now calls self.get_image_mimetype() instead of inline filetype.guess logic before base64-encoding self.image. Feel free to merge your normalize_image_bytes call in around that same validator body.
